Video.summary: Chris tests a new welder on Project Spartan's roll cage while Eric inspects the motor.
Video.title: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Image.alt: The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage
The Kaiser Gets a Roll Cage

Video.summary: Chris and Eric battle the truly insane rust in Project Spartan's '69 M715 Kaiser Jeep cab.
Video.title: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Image.alt: Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket
Our 1960s Jeep is a Rust Bucket

Video.summary: Chris and Eric are tackling Project Spartan axles and turbocharging the Polaris UTV for off-road adventures.
Video.title: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Image.alt: Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!
Axles, Tires and Turbo, Oh My!

Video.summary: Our 1969 Jeep M715 Project Spartan is getting a frame-up overhaul to look like a truck again.
Video.title: Lighting the Way Forward

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: We fabricate a new cross member, mounting brackets, and install the transfer case on our 1969 Jeep Kaiser.
Video.title: Assembling Our Base

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie machine a beastly Small Block Ford for serious pump-gas track power.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 1

Video.summary: We transform our classic C-10 with bodywork and a flawless pearl two-tone finish.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 8: Pearlfection

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: We’ll drive, teardown, and media blast a 1974 Bronco to uncover what lies beneath 40+ years of abuse.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco

Video.summary: With the help of some master craftsmen, the guys start building a Bronco from the ground up.
Video.title: Building A Bronco

Video.summary: Our ’74 Bronco build is getting a suspension overhaul plus new axles, brakes, wheels and tires!
Video.title: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Image.alt: First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension
First Gen Bronco Gets a Modern Suspension

Video.summary: It’s time to mock everything in place in our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Mocking Up a New 1974 Bronco

Video.summary: We welcome legendary custom car builder Chris Ryan and his team to help with our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Image.alt: The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors
The Beach Cruiser Bronco Gets Its Colors

Video.summary: It’s final assembly for our 1974 Bronco.
Video.title: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Image.alt: Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco
Adding Coyote Power to a Rebuilt Bronco

Video.summary: We wrap up the assembly of our Bronco.
Video.title: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Image.alt: ’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning
’74 Bronco Chills with Aftermarket Air Conditioning

Video.summary: Today we finish the final assembly of our 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco with the installation of the interior.
Video.title: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Image.alt: 1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll
1974 Beach Cruiser Bronco Is Ready To Roll

Video.summary: The guys work hard to finish their 1974 build under the hood, under the frame, and under the top.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Image.alt: Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas
Beach Cruiser Bronco Heads to Vegas

Video.summary: The guys show off the completed 1974 Bronco on the floor at SEMA.
Video.title: Beach Cruiser Bronco Finale

Video.summary: You GM fans are in for a real treat as the guys transform a 1985 Buick Regal grandma car.
Video.title: Street Regal

Video.summary: We do something never done before: build two engines to run on the dyno at the SAME TIME!
Video.title: Two Engines, One Big Plan

Video.summary: We connect TWO 496 Big Block Chevy engines to the dyno to find out exactly how much power they make.
Video.title: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Image.alt: Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno
Two 496 Big Blocks on One Dyno

Video.summary: We seek more power from our twin-engine setup by reconfiguring the exhaust and phasing the engines.
Video.title: More Double Dyno Tech

Video.summary: How to get factory-match paint for your ’69 Dodge Dart. Color mixing tips for Project Bullseye.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Match Game

Video.summary: Installing front and back suspension on a 1969 Dodge Dart, with tips for control, safety, and style.
Video.title: Project Bullseye – Suspension Installation

Video.summary: We're making real progress on Project Bullseye, our '69 Dodge Dart, with suspension, wiring, and paint.
Video.title: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Image.alt: Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash
Project Bullseye - Suspension, Fuel System, & Custom Dash

Video.summary: With its rear axle installed, new tires mounted, and trim blacked out, our 1969 Dart is now on all fours.
Video.title: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Image.alt: Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again
Finally Looks Like a Dart Again

Video.summary: Steel meets style – Today the boys finally lay down some paint on their ’69 GTO.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness
69 GTO Part 6 - The Art of Darkness

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel install a new third pedal and show you the do’s and don’ts on how to bleed the transmission
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 7 - Midnight Masterpiece

Video.summary: The guys enter the winding maze of wiring as they install a new ECU on Project Henchman.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 8 - Power Moves

Video.summary: GTO gets new exhaust and wheels, plus learn how to adjust wheel offset.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Image.alt: 69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears
69 GTO Part 9 - Music To Your Ears

Video.summary: We upgrade a '69 GTO with new glass, power windows, and a complete interior makeover.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 10 – Pane Relief

Video.summary: 1969 GTO Project Henchman's first drive! Installing a spoiler, stripes & 3D-printed pieces.
Video.title: 69 GTO Part 11 – Black Beauty

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys slam over a 1,000 horsepower into a huge mid-70’s Mercury with a sadistic streak.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Image.alt: The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max
The Highwayman: Marquis to the Max

Video.summary: The Mercury build continues with ignition, exhaust upgrade and fuel system to handle a 1000 horsepower.
Video.title: The Highwayman: Part II

Video.summary: Adding an indestructible 9-inch and air suspension to our sleeper 1,080-horse ’72 Marquis Brougham
Video.title: The Highwayman: Monster Mercury

Video.summary: The guys button up the last few details on their 1100 horsepower Mercury Monster and take her for a spin.
Video.title: The Highwayman - Odds & Ends

Video.summary: Project Cream Puff gets air-ride and a supercharger for a slammed, powerful C-10 street machine.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power
Chevy C-10 - Part 9: Low Ride, High Power

Video.summary: A real Cinderella story, our ’69 Charger needs a lot of work to make it to the ball.
Video.title: 1969 Hard Charger Hellcat

Video.summary: Pat and Frankie from Engine Power rescue an abandoned 1977 Ford Granada and turn it into a spicy sleeper.
Video.title: Spicy Granada

Video.summary: Dyno Day! We assemble our 363 SBF beast and reveal the project it was built for.
Video.title: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Image.alt: Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2
Big Bore 363 Small Block Ford Part 2

Video.summary: We found a 1977 Granada with a great body, but several mechanical issues, and get it running right!
Video.title: Fatigued Ford

Video.summary: We wanted to build a ride that looks like a Sunday driver…until you step on the throttle!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 2

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada has achieved sleeper status!
Video.title: Sleeper Granada Part 3

Video.summary: Our 1977 Ford Granada faces its toughest test during a full-throttle day at the drag strip.
Video.title: The Sleeper Awakens

Video.summary: We tear down Project Spartan to rebuild it, but its surprisingly strong engine changes our plans.
Video.title: Kaiser Jeep Chaos

Video.summary: Our 1969 Project Spartan Jeep gets custom exhaust, rear suspension, and body mounts.
Video.title: Rear Suspension Throwdown
